name: event_time
description: Exact timestamp of the event in UTC. Backbone of all time-based analysis. REQUIRED — rows missing this field are rejected at load time.

name: event_type
description: User action type. Only 3 values exist in this dataset: view, cart, purchase. REQUIRED — rows missing this field are rejected at load time.

name: product_id
description: Unique product identifier. Typed as STRING rather than INTEGER — identifiers are never used in arithmetic and STRING prevents precision loss for large numeric IDs.

name: category_id
description: Numeric category identifier stored as STRING. Values exceed safe INTEGER range (e.g. 2053013555631882655) — STRING prevents precision loss.

name: category_code
description: Hierarchical category path separated by dots. Example: electronics.smartphone, appliances.kitchen.washer. 32% of rows are null — filled with unknown in vw_clean_events.

name: brand
description: Product brand name. 14% of rows are null — filled with unknown in vw_clean_events. Mixed casing normalized to lowercase in vw_clean_events.

name: price
description: Product price at time of event in local currency. Used for revenue calculations, RFM monetary scoring, average order value and price bucket segmentation.

name: user_id
description: Unique user identifier. Typed as STRING rather than INTEGER — identifiers are never used in arithmetic operations.

name: user_session
description: UUID-style session identifier grouping events within a single browsing session. Used for session-level deduplication in vw_clean_events.
